app.description: This page demonstrates the baseline integration for i18n, theme switching, request headers, React Query, Jotai, driver.js, ahooks, and es-toolkit.
app.title: BFF Frontend Template

home.description: This frontend template for BFF projects comes with common engineering defaults and a runnable feature demo.

engineering.description: Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, pnpm, ESLint, Prettier, and commit checks are wired in.
engineering.title: Engineering baseline

i18n.description: The demo page includes Chinese and English switching, plus the lang request header rule.
i18n.title: Internationalization

theme.description: The theme follows the system preference by default and supports explicit light and dark modes.
theme.title: Theme switching

home.title: Welcome to bff-project-template

guide.languageDescription: Language changes are persisted, and non-default language requests include headers.lang.
guide.requestDescription: The request utility reads the active language and theme, then injects headers automatically.
guide.screenshotDescription: Use the screenshot button to capture the current Demo page and copy the image to your system clipboard.
guide.themeDescription: The initial theme follows the system preference, with explicit light and dark choices.

language.description: Chinese is the default. English requests include lang.
language.title: Language

request.description: Run a mocked request through the shared request utility.
request.title: Request utility

versionUpdate.description: Refresh to load the latest content.
versionUpdate.refreshAlt: Refresh the page to update to the latest version
versionUpdate.title: New version available
